text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: My chest is tight! And it feels hot, like it's on fire!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm shaking and sweating. What's going on with
me?
choice_data_list: That sounds like you're taking this seriously.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so this is what it means to take something
seriously... I think I get it now!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So it's okay that I feel like this? Then I'll do my
best, sweatiness and all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm gonna get first place this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is going to be a tough race. I'm sure Haru
Urara knows that. Just being able to enter is quite
a feat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she won't give up. She's not that type of
person. So...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The audience's cheers get louder. I'm sure there
are quite a few of Haru Urara's fans among them.
Fans that believe in her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And... I believe in her too! I'm looking forward to
your victory, Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And... I believe in her too! I'm looking forward to
your victory, Haru Urara!
